Jonathan T. Rodriguez, Esq. of SEDGWICK, DETERT 781-7900, for defendants and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court heard PLAINTIFF OLIVIA BOUDREAUX, ind. and as Guardian ad Litem for Minors: LaCoria Beckwith, Mariah Harris and Frank Harris's (Ccp 473.5) Motion To Reconsider The Order Sustaining The Demurrer & Motion To Strike.
